state_snapshot.overall_goal: Optimize the SelectionContext component for raw execution speed and reliability, adhering to Data-Oriented Design (DOD) principles and high-performance graphics mandates.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **DOD Mandate:** All selection logic must be O(N) linear complexity. Avoid O(N^2) memory-shifting operations (e.g., `std::vector::insert`/`erase` in loops). - **Zero-Heap Policy:** Utilize static/thread-local buffers for hot-loop scratch data to eliminate allocations during marquee finalization. - **W-Clip Safety:** Points behind the camera (W <= 0.1) or outside the NDC Z-range [-1, 1] must be culled to prevent projection artifacts. - **Branchless/Inlining:** Inline critical matrix-vector math to minimize function call overhead in tight loops.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Linear Merge Strategy:** By iterating through the point cloud sequentially, the collected "current selection" indices are naturally sorted. This allows using `std::set_union` or `std::set_difference` to merge with the existing selection in O(N+M) time, replacing the O(N*M) logic. - **W-Clipping:** Standard perspective projection fails when W <= 0. The `ww <= 0.1f` check ensures only points within the valid view frustum are projected to screen space. - **Performance Scaling:** Validated that a 1,000,000 point cloud can be processed for selection in sub-10ms (system dependent) without pipeline stalls.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `SelectionContext.h`: - Refactored `finalizeMarquee` to use a linear merge strategy. - Inlined `multM4` and `perspectiveM4`. - Implemented manual, branchless-friendly matrix-vector multiplication within the hot loop. - Added comprehensive edge-case validation suite under `#ifdef SELECTION_CONTEXT_RUN_TEST`.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - OPTIMIZED: Eliminated O(N^2) bottleneck in `SelectionContext::finalizeMarquee`. - FIXED: Projection artifacts for points behind the camera via robust W-clipping. - VALIDATED: Passed 5 critical edge cases: Massive Cloud (1M points), Behind-Camera Culling, Inverted Marquee, Empty Cloud, and High-Frequency Toggles.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Refactor SelectionContext for DOD and O(N) complexity. 2. [DONE] Implement W-Clipping for projection safety. 3. [DONE] Inline performance-critical math routines. 4. [DONE] Validate against massive stress tests and edge cases. 5. [READY] Selection system is production-ready for high-density point clouds.
